hero.title: Safwan
hero.subtitle: Electrical & Electronics Engineering Student & AI Developer
hero.description: Final-year Electrical & Electronics Engineering student at Erzincan Binali Yıldırım University. Originally from Egypt, I live in Kuwait and currently study in Turkey. I build at the intersection of hardware and AI — spanning embedded systems, signal processing, neural networks, and machine learning.

about.label: About Me
about.title: The person behind the screen
about.bio_1: I am a final-year Electrical & Electronics Engineering student at Erzincan Binali Yıldırım University. Originally from Egypt, I live in Kuwait and currently study in Turkey.
about.bio_2: My work spans embedded systems (Arduino, STM32), signal processing (FFT, filter design), and Artificial Intelligence. Whether it's debugging a complex circuit or training a neural network model, I believe the best engineers deeply understand both the hardware and intelligent software layers.
about.bio_3: Outside of coursework, I explore deep learning architectures, develop games using Godot 4.7 (such as my project AstroDodge), and experiment with IoT and gesture-recognition technologies.

astrododge.title: AstroDodge
astrododge.description: A 2D space dodging game built with Godot 4.7. Features procedural obstacle generation, particle effects, and a dynamic scoring system. An ongoing game development project of mine.

sign2speech.title: Sign2Speech
sign2speech.description: A gesture-to-speech recognition system that converts hand gestures captured via sensors into spoken output. It seamlessly combines embedded hardware with signal processing for accessible communication.

portfolio.title: 3D Portfolio
portfolio.description: This website — an interactive 3D portfolio built using React Three Fiber. It features cinematic bloom lighting, scroll-driven camera animations, and comprehensive i18n support (EN/AR/TR).

dsp-toolkit.title: DSP Toolkit
dsp-toolkit.description: A Python toolkit designed for digital signal processing coursework: features FFT analysis, FIR/IIR filter design, spectrogram generation, and real-time audio visualization using Matplotlib.

boost_converter_pwm.title: Boost Converter PWM
boost_converter_pwm.description: An Arduino-based PWM control system for a boost converter. It includes closed-loop voltage regulation, duty cycle sweeping, and real-time monitoring via serial communication.

astrododge-pygame.title: AstroDodge (Pygame)
astrododge-pygame.description: A Python/Pygame port of the AstroDodge space game. It features a sprite-based rendering engine, precise collision detection, scoring, and difficulty scaling.
